steps.t: You should tell Watcyn the truth about Rendal's past.
Watcyn has pleaded for you and Rendal to help him. You should talk to Rendal and decide on what to do.
Rendal plans to attack the captains in Gaervarad. You should meet with him there. Gaervarad is located to the south-west of Sírlond.
You have found Rendal near Gaervarad. You should talk to him to discuss what to do next.
